channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: XRP climbs toward $1.38 as Japan's Rakuten integrates token for payments
item.description: Breakout backed by institutional flows and whale buying, with Japan adoption adding a fresh demand narrative....

item.description: The ETH/BTC ratio hit its highest since January as Ethereum's network added 284,000 new users in Q1 and stablecoin supply reached a record $180 billion....

item.title: SOL, ADA, DOGE pullback, bitcoin holds above $74,000 as Asia recoups Iran war losses

item.description: Microsoft has introduced new Windows protections to defend against phishing attacks that abuse Remote Desktop connection (.rdp) files, adding warnings and disabling risky shared resources by default. ...
